task.description: Add handling for --json flag in the parse function so it outputs JSON format.

l1.content:
{
  "edit_description": "Add 'json' to parse function output and add 'json' to output section",
  "target_files": [
    "cmd/commands/parse.go"
  ],
  "patch_commands": [
    "sed -i 's/return.*json.*$/return json/' cmd/commands/parse.go",
    "sed -i 's/.*json.*$/json/' cmd/commands/parse.go"
  ],
  "validation_commands": [
    "grep -q 'json' cmd/commands/parse.go",
    "grep -q 'json' cmd/commands/parse.go"
  ],
  "expected_outcome": "parse function now outputs JSON format",
  "risk_notes": "No risk noted",
  "follow_up_type": "none|needs_review"
}

parsed.edit_description: Add 'json' to parse function output and add 'json' to output section
parsed.expected_outcome: parse function now outputs JSON format
